query:
INSERT INTO secrets (name, value_ct, value_nonce, aead_algo, dek_wrapped, kek_version)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
            ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET
                value_ct = $2, value_nonce = $3, aead_algo = $4,
                dek_wrapped = $5, kek_version = $6, updated_at = now()
            RETURNING id
